title: Christmas Tree Topper 20cm Gold Glitter Christmas Tree Star with Sequins, Festive Xmas Tree Decoration
features: 20cm Gold Glitter Star Design to Highlight Tree Focal Point: This Christmas Tree Topper features a 20cm gold glitter Christmas tree star shape with embedded sparkling sequins. It shines brilliantly under light, easily becoming the visual center of the Christmas tree and instantly enhancing the sophistication and ritual of the overall festive atmosphere

Premium Material with Glitter Craft, Sturdy & Reusable: Made with high-quality iron wire frame and gold glitter coating technology, the star shape is stable and not easily deformed. Sequins and glitter have strong adhesion to prevent falling off. The durable material ensures years of reuse, making it a cost-effective choice for holiday decorations

Spiral Base for Secure & Easy Installation: Equipped with a spiral spring base, it can be firmly installed by gently twisting into the top of the Christmas tree. Compatible with most tree sizes, no extra tools required—easy to operate for both the elderly and children, keeping the gold glitter star steadily as the tree’s highlight

Versatile Style for Various Decor Scenes: The classic gold glitter Christmas tree star shape seamlessly fits into various Christmas themes, whether traditional red-green, Nordic minimalist, or luxury styles. It can also be paired with LED light strings for DIY glowing effects, creating a dreamy glow with glitter and light

Widely Applicable, Ideal Holiday Gift: In addition to home Christmas tree decoration, this gold glitter star is suitable for festive arrangements in commercial spaces like malls, restaurants, and offices. With exquisite glitter craft and practicality, it’s also a thoughtful holiday gift for relatives and friends to convey Christmas wishes
description: This 20cm gold glitter Christmas tree star topper is the ideal choice to add festive magic to your Christmas tree. As the "finishing touch" of the tree, it features an exquisite star shape with shimmering glitter and sequins, glowing warmly and beautifully under Christmas lights, instantly bringing the entire tree to life. Made with a durable iron wire frame, it has a uniform and full gold glitter coating, with firmly embedded sequins, ensuring it remains brilliant after multiple uses. The spiral base design simplifies installation—no complicated steps required, easily fixing to the top of the tree, stable and not easy to topple, compatible with most home and commercial Christmas tree sizes. Whether paired with traditional Christmas decorations, modern minimalist styles, or creative DIY arrangements, this gold glitter star seamlessly integrates, becoming an eye-catching highlight in festive spaces. It’s not just a decoration, but a symbol of festive memories, making every Christmas full of warmth and joy. Whether for home use, commercial decoration, or as a holiday gift, this Christmas tree star topper meets your needs, adding a touch of brilliance to the Christmas season.
